channel.title: All Posts - have_you_met_rahul

item.title: Catharsis
item.author: Author
item.description: Teaching and research are two strands of my DNA I really love teaching and is my happy place I am a happy person who is slightly above average in multiple things Life was going downward spiral in my life till year 2010 That year I completed a bachelor’s degree in engineering BUT, I had limited skills, poor confidence and was absolutely clueless about where I am heading I went around attending job interviews with some of my friends Nothing happened and decided to pack my bags and spent one year preapring for entrance exam towards a masters degree in engineering August 8th 2010 was my life’s turning point at age 22!

item.title: Basic Neuorosciences
item.author: Author
item.description: This article offers a sample of basic Markdown syntax that can be used in Hugo content files.

item.title: Cube Basics
item.author: Author
item.description: ajisha vadakkepattu , bangalore Tip LoveIt theme has special shortcode for image, which provides more features.
